creator: IZ-FreeBSD0701@hs-karlsruhe.de
text:
The svn SVN rev 209632, 210563 of src/lib/libfetch/http.c and SVN rev 217505 of
src/lib/libfetch/ftp.c are not MFC to RELENG_8 and other branches.

Fix: 

MFC the patches.
How-To-Repeat: Try to use portupgrade on an authenticating HTTP-proxy with an actual RELENG_8
branch with and whitout the patches.
